scope.summary: Import ZaloDataExtractor JSON credentials: add types/ DTOs (Credentials, AccountProfile, CredentialSummary) and a command/ import_credentials handler that validates the JSON and returns a non-secret summary to the UI.
goals: types/ exposes pure Credentials + AccountProfile DTOs with no zca-rust dependency
command/ import_credentials parses + validates the export and returns CredentialSummary (no token values)
Invalid JSON / missing fields are rejected with a clear, value-free error; valid payloads parse
nonGoals: Returning imei/cookie/userAgent values across the IPC boundary

acceptance.description: types/ provides Credentials + AccountProfile DTOs that deserialize the ZaloDataExtractor shape and validate required fields.
command/ import_credentials parses JSON, validates, and returns a non-secret CredentialSummary.
Malformed JSON, empty cookies, and blank imei are rejected with clear errors; a valid payload imports and language defaults to vi.
